title: Instant Resurrection
description: A very simple Fabric mod, that makes you instantly respawn upon death (toggleable).
body:
**⚠️Important⚠️**

This mod requires **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**.

<hr>

_Ever get annoyed because the disabled respawn button takes a second before enabling itself, every time you DIE? Well, you just came to the right place!_

**Mod Description**

**Instant Resurrecion** is a **CLIENT**-sided only Minecraft mod for the **Fabric Loader**, that allows the player to be able to instantly respawn upon dying. This mod is toggleable via the  **H** key by default.

For a visual of the mod, please play the **Mod Demonstration Video** below.

<hr>

**Mod Demonstration Video**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/VBWdrE1uh3c" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<hr>

**Why Download?**

This mod allows you to **bypass the waiting time & respawn instantly before the respawn button gets enabled** again, **saving time** in your Minecraft gameplay.

<hr>

**⚠️IMPORANT NOTE⚠️**

This mod _may_ cause an upper-hand unfair advantage against other players on public servers. **Please** ask your server's Admin, Moderator, or anyone with power to verify the use of this mod on their server.
